templates.name: 電影級場景
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

Generate a cinematic scene: {{場景描述}}. Style: {{風格}}, shot on 35mm film. Lighting: {{燈光}}. Camera angle: {{鏡頭角度}}. Color palette: {{色調}}. Ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, photorealistic.

variables.name: 場景描述
variables.defaultValue: a futuristic cyberpunk city at night with neon lights

variables.name: 燈光
variables.defaultValue: dramatic neon glow with volumetric fog

templates.name: 人物肖像
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

Create a {{風格}} portrait of {{人物描述}}. Expression: {{表情}}. Background: {{背景}}. Lighting: {{燈光}}. Art style: {{藝術風格}}. Highly detailed, professional quality.

variables.name: 人物描述
variables.defaultValue: a young woman with flowing dark hair

variables.name: 藝術風格
variables.defaultValue: digital art with oil painting texture

templates.name: 產品展示圖
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

Professional product photography of {{產品描述}}. Background: {{背景}}. Lighting: studio softbox, {{補充燈光}}. Angle: {{拍攝角度}}. Style: clean, commercial, magazine-quality. High resolution.

variables.name: 背景
variables.defaultValue: clean gradient white to light gray

templates.name: Logo 與圖標設計
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

Design a modern {{類型}} logo for {{品牌名稱}}. Concept: {{概念描述}}. Style: {{風格}}. Colors: {{配色}}. Must be clean, scalable, and work on both light and dark backgrounds. Minimalist, vector-style.

templates.name: 建築視覺化
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

Architectural visualization: {{建築描述}}. Style: {{建築風格}}. Environment: {{環境}}. Time of day: {{時間}}. Materials: {{材質}}. Photorealistic rendering, award-winning architectural photography.

variables.name: 建築描述
variables.defaultValue: a modern glass villa with infinity pool

variables.name: 材質
variables.defaultValue: floor-to-ceiling glass, exposed concrete, warm wood

templates.name: 動漫角色設計
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

Design an anime/manga character: {{角色描述}}. Hair: {{髮型髮色}}. Outfit: {{服裝}}. Pose: {{姿勢}}. Background: {{背景}}. Art style: {{畫風}}. Clean lines, vibrant colors, detailed character sheet.

variables.name: 髮型髮色
variables.defaultValue: long flowing silver hair with blue tips

variables.name: 服裝
variables.defaultValue: ornate dark fantasy armor with glowing runes

variables.name: 背景
variables.defaultValue: ancient magical forest with floating crystals

templates.name: 食物攝影
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

Professional food photography: {{食物描述}}. Plating style: {{擺盤}}. Surface: {{桌面材質}}. Props: {{道具}}. Lighting: {{燈光}}. Shot from {{角度}}. Appetizing, editorial quality, for a gourmet magazine.

variables.name: 食物描述
variables.defaultValue: a steaming bowl of tonkotsu ramen with soft-boiled egg

variables.name: 道具
variables.defaultValue: bamboo chopsticks, linen napkin, small sake cup

templates.name: 風格轉換
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

Transform this image into {{目標風格}} style. Keep the original composition and subject matter. Apply {{藝術流派}} aesthetic. Adjust color palette to {{色調}}. Maintain structural integrity while fully adopting the new artistic style.

variables.name: 色調
variables.defaultValue: warm pastel tones with soft blues

templates.name: 角色一致性續圖
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

Generate the same character: {{角色描述}} (maintain exact appearance, clothing, and features). New scene: {{新場景}}. New pose: {{新姿勢}}. Same art style as reference. Ensure character consistency across images.

variables.name: 角色描述
variables.defaultValue: a young woman with short red hair, green eyes, wearing a brown leather jacket

variables.name: 新場景
variables.defaultValue: cozy coffee shop interior with warm lighting

variables.name: 新姿勢
variables.defaultValue: sitting by the window, reading a book

templates.name: 場景延伸
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

Expand this scene outward. The original image shows: {{原圖描述}}. Extend the scene to reveal: {{延伸方向與內容}}. Maintain consistent lighting, perspective, style, and color palette with the original.

variables.name: 原圖描述
variables.defaultValue: a castle on a cliff at sunset

variables.name: 延伸方向與內容
variables.placeholder: 例如：expand left to show ocean
variables.defaultValue: expand downward to reveal the winding path leading up the cliff, with a medieval village at the base

templates.name: Prompt 增強器
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

我有一個簡單的圖片生成描述：「{{原始描述}}」。請幫我擴充為專業的 AI 圖片生成 prompt，包含：1) 主體細節描述 2) 環境與背景 3) 燈光設定 4) 鏡頭與構圖 5) 藝術風格 6) 品質關鍵字。輸出英文 prompt，可直接用於 Grok Imagine / Gemini 圖片生成。

variables.name: 原始描述
variables.defaultValue: 一隻貓坐在窗邊看著雨

templates.name: 負面提示詞組合
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

Negative prompt for high-quality generation: blurry, low quality, distorted, deformed, disfigured, bad anatomy, wrong proportions, extra limbs, extra fingers, mutated hands, poorly drawn, watermark, signature, text, logo, cropped, out of frame, duplicate, ugly, morbid, mutation. {{額外排除項目}}

templates.name: 16宮格 敘事分鏡圖
templates.content:
你是一位專家 act like an expert.

Create a 16-panel storyboard grid layout (4x4) depicting a narrative sequence.
Story: {{故事情節}}.
Protagonist: {{主角描述}}.
Style: {{風格}}.

The 16 panels must be clearly separated by thin borders, reading left-to-right, top-to-bottom. Varied cinematic camera angles (wide shots, extreme close-ups, over-the-shoulder). Consistent character design and environment across all panels. Show progression of time and action.

variables.name: 故事情節
variables.placeholder: 例如：英雄發現秘密武器並與反派對決
variables.defaultValue: a hero discovers an ancient artifact, trains to use it, and finally confronts the dark lord

variables.name: 主角描述
variables.defaultValue: a young brave knight with silver armor and a red cape

variables.name: 風格
variables.defaultValue: cinematic professional storyboard sketch, monochrome with dramatic shading
